name: IGH_ValueProxy
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.Kernel.IGH_ValueProxy.)

methods.name: Duplicate
methods.summary: Create an exact duplicate of the type.
methods.remarks: Implementors: Do not maintain references to class instances. Copy EVERYTHING.

methods.name: FromString
methods.summary: If IsParsable(), then attempts to convert the string to a generic type value

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure. This method should not throw exceptions.

methods.name: MutateString
methods.summary: Munge a string to remove obvious errors on account of the user.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a String description of the current value.
methods.remarks: If the implementation IsParsable(), then this representation must be in parsable format.

properties.name: IsParsable
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the type can be instantiated from a String

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the current value is valid

properties.name: ProxyName
properties.summary: Gets a human-friendly name description of the template type

properties.name: ProxyType
properties.summary: Gets the System.Type description of the template type

properties.name: ProxyValue
properties.summary: Gets an instance of the local template type object

properties.name: UserString
properties.summary: Gets or sets the user-defined string that describes this proxy This only really makes sense if the Proxy is Parsable.
